titleStmt.title: SII 5.760: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 760. (A.R. No. 196 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟavarmma rāna tribhuvanaścakra vattikaḷ śrīvīrapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etir patiṉoṉṟāvatu karkkaṭaka ñāyaṟṟu muppatān tiyatiyum pūrṇai yum somavāra mum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ Uṭaiyār viśvanāthan koyililt tāṉattārkku Uṭaiyār viśvanāthan Amutu ceyyumpaṭi nāḷ Oṉṟukku nām
kaṟpitta tiruppaṇiyāram paṉṉiraṇṭukku Amutupaṭi nāḻiyum paruppuamutu nāḻiyum caṟkarai Amutu palam Eḻum teṅkāyamutu Oṉṟum neyyamutu Uḻakkum Ākak kaṟpitta Itukkup patiṉoṉṟāvatu kārmutalukkut tevatāṉamāka viṭṭa nilam pattumāvukkuk kallakanāṭṭu Ataḷaikuḷattiṉ kiḻ Oṉpatāṅ kaṇ
ṇāṟu meṟkuniṉṟuṅ karaikkuṅ kālukkuṅ kiḻakku nilam nālumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ kiḻmukkāle Araikkālum pattāṅ kaṇṇāṟu kiḻakkuniṉṟum cātericukku meṟkum vaṭakku nilam nālumā mukkāṇiyiṉ kiḻmukkāle muṉṟumā mukkāṇiyum patiṉoṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟu meṟku
niṉṟum taṭipala viṭṭuk kiḻakku nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ kiḻ muṉṟumā mukkāṇiyum Āka nilam pattumā Iṉṉilam pattu māvum Iṉṉāḷ mutalukkuk kaiyāṇṭu tiruppaṇiyāramum kuṟaivaṟa naṭattip potumpaṭi kaṟpittaaḷavukku Immariyātiyile Ivvolai piṭipāṭāka
candrāditya vaṟ cellak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭi Ivvālaiyam Uḷḷa Aḷavun tevatāṉamākak kaiyāṇṭukoṇṭu tiruppaṇiyāramuṅ kuṟaivaṟa naṭattippotavum pāṟka Ivai kkamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu tulyam
Digital edition of SII 5.760 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
